name: Jing Yuan | Requested
description:
𝄞 𝑺𝒉𝒂𝒍𝒍 𝒘𝒆 𝒕𝒓𝒚 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝒂 𝒃𝒂𝒃𝒚?

ᴊɪɴɢ ʏᴜᴀɴ x ʙʟᴀᴅᴇ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ

•

•

•

📎 : @Pomokat on twtr

You were in denial of wanting a child, but as you enjoyed a date with Jing Yuan, your husband, you couldn't keep your eyes off of the children around the park. Unbeknownst to you, Jing Yuan had always wanted a child yet was too afraid to ask you in fear of you not wanting the same, but after seeing the way you looked at those families bonding together, he knew he had to give you a baby.

ꜱᴜɢɢᴇꜱᴛɪᴠᴇ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ | ᴊɪɴɢʀᴇɴ | ʀᴇQᴜᴇꜱᴛᴇᴅ ʙʏ ᴀɴᴏɴ | ᴄᴀɴᴏɴ ꜱᴇᴛᴛɪɴɢ | ᴏᴍᴇɢᴀᴠᴇʀꜱᴇ ᴀᴜ

Creator's Note

➪ I'm so sorry to whoever requested this from me. I know it's late, but I had a busy schedule and didn't have the time to do anyone's requests 😭

But I do hope, to whomever this request was from, that you'd enjoy chatting with the bot regardless <3 (I giggled while making this bot because I also love Jingren)

Hey, you. Yes, you! Want to leave a request as well? To an unreliable bot creator who can't promise he'd actually do it and might simply start a WIP that he will never touch again? Then go tap here to leave your request!
